experiment: oracle-coverage batch (m0b, l3a, a5) — deterministic-grounding + kernel-vocabulary-coverage family, correctness thesis
candidate: deterministic oracle legs (kot-axiom/1 rules engine: family/world vertical + code vertical) + the M0B-COVERAGE-GATE niche-scope census
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/<id>.json alongside f2b-replicate, compression-census, define-op-census, g-series. This is the ONE batched FABLE interpretive assessment for the ORACLE+COVERAGE family (batching per the programme-completion loop step 1, docs/next/programme-completion-loop.md). Unlike the G-series batch, ALL THREE members have frozen SAPs, chained final-phase results-logs, pure-function verdict objects, AND CONFIRMED cross-vendor Gate-A audits — run-status was independently re-verified here (see status_census) in light of the sibling finding that audit-status.py conflates NOT-RUN with awaiting-assessment; no such conflation affects this batch. a5-llm (the engine-vs-LLM head-to-head successor) is EXPLICITLY OUT OF SCOPE: its verdict is PASS-PENDING-AUDIT with a contested Codex audit and its ruling is a separate Fable task; nothing here interprets, upgrades, or discounts a5-llm.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per the kern Fable/Opus execution split: verdict-gen already produced the mechanical verdicts (pure function of frozen SAP + chained log) and Codex/GPT-5.5 Gate-A audits CONFIRMED all three; what those numbers MEAN for the correctness thesis is decided here and only here. Analyst role file .claude/agents/analyst.md; this record interprets, it does not grade, re-grade, or audit. Scope discipline: registry/assessments/ ONLY — audit-status.jsonl NOT touched (update lines reported to the coordinator for serial append); no experiment record, verdict, correction, or engine code modified; G-series and f-efficiency assessment files, poc/gpt56-review/, poc/f2b-transfer/llmproxy*, poc/a5-llm/ untouched (other agents' files).

discrepancies: NONE for this batch. Independent re-verification against the tasking's warning (audit-status.py renders NOT-RUN rows indistinguishably from run-awaiting-assessment): all three members are FROZEN with chained final-phase results-logs, real pure-function verdict objects, and CONFIRMED cross-vendor audits. Nothing here is interpreted from a design doc in place of a missing verdict.

CONTEXT ONLY (not a discrepancy of this batch, not interpreted here): the successor a5-llm carries verdict PASS-PENDING-AUDIT with audit state PENDING in its verdict object while its Codex audit outcome is contested (pin defect); its ruling is a separate Fable task. No claim in this assessment depends on a5-llm in either direction.

measurement_refs.scope_note: All three verdicts: rung R0 (no host model), scale_language_licensed: none. m0b coverage is corpus-indexed (pinned TinyStories task-family table, denominator 1,709,765 content-word tokens) and kernel-state-indexed (the incomplete kernel-v0 + molecules-v0 instance of 2026-07-08). l3a/a5 carry coverage: null BY DESIGN — their covered slices are authored against their own stores (coverage by construction), so no m0b-style gate applies and no fact-coverage claim exists. Extrapolation envelopes verbatim in each verdict are binding on every number quoted below.

_surprise_note: No registered prior / claim.md exists for any of the three (m0b is a census gate with a pre-declared threshold, not a hypothesis; l3a/a5 are instrument-adequacy gates whose planning value ~1.0 passed the P8 §1.6 decidability lint), so no surprise-* tag is licensed. Informally: the engine legs landing at raw 600/600, 300/300, 855/855, 122/122 is what a CORRECT deterministic engine should do — the information is in the audited confirmation that it actually does, plus the fail-closed semantics surviving strict-code scoring. m0b's 0.3542 was genuinely unknown beforehand and sits in the awkward-but-informative middle: above the 0.20 niche gate, far below anything resembling general coverage.

interpretation.headline: The deterministic-grounding-and-checking half of the correctness case now rests on three audited MEASURED facts, all at R0 (no host model). (1) m0b [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/m0b.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the kernel vocabulary reaches 0.3542 of the pinned TinyStories task-family content-word mass at the molecules-v0 rung (kernel-v0 0.2210, wn31-aligned band 0.7841) — above the pre-declared 0.20 NICHE-SCOPE gate, so the niche banner does NOT bind, on ONE corpus and ONE incomplete kernel instance. (2) l3a [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/l3a.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the kot-axiom/1 v0 rules engine on gold-parsed closed-grammar queries is exact and fail-closed — covered-exact Wilson-LB 0.9955 (raw 600/600 with provenance + non-empty axiom license), strict correct-refusal-code Wilson-LB 0.9911 (raw 300/300), all 6 planted store violations surfaced, ~5.3 us/query on shared CPU. (3) a5 [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/a5.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the BYTE-IDENTICAL engine, extended only by data and a pure desugaring layer over a deterministically-extracted code world layer, repeats the pattern — covered-exact Wilson-LB 0.9968 (raw 855/855), strict refusal Wilson-LB 0.9783 (raw 122/122), all 3 planted violations surfaced, ~7.8 us/query. Together: the Law-3 deterministic seat (formal language + engine that owns correctness) EXISTS, is sound on its covered slices, fails closed off them, costs microseconds, and ports across a domain vertical without touching the engine. What none of this contains: a model, natural language, a non-trivial baseline, or any real-world fact/corpus coverage. These are instrument-adequacy and perimeter facts; the claim that this grounding helps any LLM remains entirely unmeasured (the programme's own bottom line stands: zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null).

m0b.verdict: PASS (fired rule 2: coverage_fraction 0.3542 > 0.20) — the NICHE-SCOPE banner consequence does NOT bind; verdict templates need not render it and frontier-pitch routes need not carry the coverage-growth cost line as a gate consequence (though coverage growth remains a live programme axis on the merits).
m0b.mechanical_numbers: coverage_fraction 0.3542001386155407 at primary rung molecules-v0, over the FULL census denominator 1,709,765 content-word tokens (605,599 covered; audit independently recomputed the exact fraction). Secondary by-rung: kernel-v0 0.2210, molecules-v0 0.3542, wn31-aligned 0.7841. Deterministic census, no sampling, no annotators, no statistical test (count-based criterion per P1 common rules; the non-top-500 tail counts as uncovered — the conservative direction).
m0b.means_for_correctness_thesis: m0b is the correctness thesis's PERIMETER measurement: it bounds where 'kernel-covered slice' claims can even apply. Two readings, both licensed and both necessary: (i) the kernel is NOT (yet) a niche artifact on its own task family — a third of the friendliest measured corpus's content-word mass is reachable at the molecules rung, clearing the pre-declared gate with a 1.77x margin, so downstream covered-slice experiments on TinyStories-derived corpora are measuring something non-trivial; (ii) nearly TWO-THIRDS of content-word mass on the MOST favourable corpus is unreachable, so every covered-slice win — including any future end-task win — is a claim about at most ~35% of even this domain until the kernel grows. The gap between kernel-v0 (0.2210) and molecules-v0 (0.3542) is the measured value of the molecule layer; the wn31-aligned band (0.7841) is the AxiomsOnly-REACHABLE ceiling and is never quotable as explicated coverage. Coverage here is surface-form vocabulary membership — a crude LOWER bound of judgment-based expressibility, and an UPPER bound on nothing.
m0b.kill_chain_read: SUPPORTS (by not firing) the non-niche sub-claim at gate strength: the pre-registered consequence (NICHE-SCOPE banner on every verdict + mandatory coverage-growth cost line on frontier pitches) is not bound. It KILLS nothing and cannot: m0b is a gate-with-consequence, not a hypothesis. It does NOT support any general-coverage claim — the register's worked caution (ASM-0001/ASM-0002) exists precisely because this number was once narrated as 'natural coverage'; that promotion remains unlicensed and this assessment does not repeat it.
caveats: Corpus-indexed, rung-indexed, kernel-state-indexed (envelope verbatim): extrapolates to NO other corpus or rung; re-measured as the kernel grows. The one measured transfer warning is live: f2's D-EXT external slice showed behaviour that did NOT track in-house-slice behaviour (ASM-0002 resolution path: census every new corpus before citing a coverage number for it).
TinyStories as the gate corpus is itself a STIPULATION (ASM-0003, GNG-0-ratified, maintainer-owned): the proxy lapses for non-TinyStories-derived eval corpora and for frontier-scale task families.

Membership census, not usability: a covered token is one whose lemma is reachable in the kernel vocabulary — it says nothing about whether the covering entry's explication is sound (g2/g3 territory, unmeasured) or useful (Tier-1 territory, unmeasured). Downstream, the compression-census assessment measured that proposition-level ENGAGEMENT on this same corpus/instance is ~0.6% — two orders below token-mass coverage — so 0.3542 must never be read as 'fraction of corpus the kernel can do something with'.
One incomplete kernel instance on one day (2026-07-08 state); the coverage-growth curve (P7 RT-11/§10) is the pre-registered longitudinal object, and this number is its first point, not its estimate.

l3a.verdict: PASS (fired rule 2, conjunctive: covered-exact Wilson-LB 0.9955 > 0.98 AND strict-refusal Wilson-LB 0.9911 > 0.95 AND all 6 planted violations detected).
l3a.mechanical_numbers: Engine arm: 600/600 covered queries answered exactly (value = expected, provenance ids all in the world store, non-empty axiom license), one-sided Wilson 95% LB 0.9955; 300/300 control queries refused with the EXACT pre-authored ERR_* code (strict), Wilson LB 0.9911; 6/6 planted store violations (2 functional, 2 card-max, 1 disjoint, 1 range) surfaced at load; mean 5.29 us/query on the shared 2-core box. Trivial-policy baselines bracket the conjunction as designed: abstain-all covered 0.0 / refused-any 1.0; answer-all covered 1.0 / refused 0.0 — neither can satisfy the conjunctive primary, which is what makes the conjunction non-degenerate.
l3a.means_for_correctness_thesis: This is the first MEASURED existence proof of the programme's own Law-3 engine seat: a native (no semantic-web-legacy) closed axiom grammar + four-strata store + deterministic engine that (i) answers ONLY what an endorsed axiom licenses (uniqueness never assumed from data, counts never inferred from record enumeration, instance-false only via disjointness — 'a gloss file cannot count parents', operationalised and passing), (ii) refuses everything else with a NAMED code through a pre-registered fail-closed validation order, and (iii) carries provenance + license on every answer. The strict-code refusal leg is where the substance lives: answer-all gets the covered leg free, and abstain-all gets refusal-by-count free, but ONLY a correctly-licensed engine gets both, with the exact code, 300/300. The verifier-not-in-the-vector strata separation held (sidecar + world records reference URNs; concept identity untouched), and the X3 cosine ban is honoured trivially (no similarity step exists anywhere in the answer path). For the correctness thesis this banks the checking INSTRUMENT the thesis needs (E9's constraint-violation arm consumes this engine) — it is deliberately NOT evidence that checking helps anything.
l3a.kill_chain_read: HL3a clause 1 (engine/store indictment: gold-parse answers below the pre-declared fractions) did NOT fire — the engine leg SURVIVES and the stage-indictment instrument certifies the stage. Clauses 2 (mapper-parse loses too much vs gold-parse: the NL boundary eats the rung) and 3 (LLM+RAG matches engine accuracy at comparable cost: the differentiator fails) are UNDECIDED BY CONSTRUCTION — they belong to pre-registered successors (l3a-parse, l3a-cost) and this record cannot decide them. Net: supports the 'a sound deterministic oracle over kernel-governed records exists' sub-claim; leaves the two sub-claims that make it USEFUL (NL reachability, LLM-comparative advantage) fully open.
caveats: Coverage by construction: the 900-query eval was AUTHORED against the 598-record store, so the covered-exact rate measures engine correctness, not world coverage — real-world fact coverage is exactly what this experiment does not measure (design §8). The oracle-leakage lesson from f2's D-QA slice generalises: scoring against self-authored records is inherent to instrument-adequacy designs and caps the claim at instrument adequacy.

Single-author circularity (ASM-0006, STIPULATED): the eval generator and the engine share an author; the register's own revisit condition — the cross-vendor audit must independently re-derive a sample of expected answers from raw records — WAS satisfied (Codex re-derived 34 expectations, 2 per family across all 9 covered + 8 control families, all matching), which is what lets this PASS count as CONFIRMED rather than internally-consistent-only.

Relation-reading stipulation (ASM-0004): molecules-v0 'mother'/'father', kernel-v0 'maker-of'/'part-of' are read as relations with stipulated directions; the concepts' explications are not natively relational. The stipulation lapses when relational concepts are minted natively and the corpora are re-authored (registered successor).

Tiny scale: 6 axiom records, 598 world records, 324 entities, 4 query ops. The envelope class is right for this (formalism property on the kernel-size axis, HS2-HS8 class: re-verify by regression re-run as inventories grow), but nothing about behaviour under axiom-set growth, subClassOf closure (v0 refuses it fail-closed as ERR_AXIOM_UNIMPLEMENTED), or contention between axioms is measured.

R0, no host model: extrapolates to NO natural-language behaviour, NO LLM-comparative accuracy or cost (the descriptive 5.3 us/query is a V-ledger line, NOT the HL3a 10^3 cost-ratio claim), and licenses NO statement about kernel usefulness to any model (envelope verbatim).

a5.verdict: PASS (fired rule 2, conjunctive: covered-exact Wilson-LB 0.9968 > 0.98 AND strict-refusal Wilson-LB 0.9783 > 0.95 AND all 3 planted violations detected).
a5.mechanical_numbers: Engine arm: 855/855 covered code-structure queries answered exactly with provenance + license, Wilson LB 0.9968; 122/122 control queries refused with the exact ERR_* code, Wilson LB 0.9783 (the lower LB reflects the smaller control n=122, not a lower raw rate — raw is 100% on both legs); 3/3 planted violations (disjoint, card-max, range) surfaced; mean 7.82 us/query. World layer: 889 records = 879 extracted by kot-code-extract/1 (CPython stdlib ast, RNG-free, conservative static assertion) from a pinned 15-file Python snapshot of this repo's own tooling + 10 provenance-flagged planted records. Engine kot_axiom.py BYTE-IDENTICAL to the l3a pin; the code grammar (8 ops) is a pure desugaring layer.
a5.means_for_correctness_thesis: a5 adds the two things l3a alone could not claim. FIRST, portability-without-modification: the identical engine binary serves a second domain vertical given only new data (5 axiom records, an extracted world layer) and a closed desugaring grammar — evidence that the four-strata design generalises as a FORMALISM, not as a hand-fit artifact of the family litmus. The reuse of kernel-v0 part-of/has-part for code containment is the first measured instance of the kernel's cross-domain concept-identity value proposition (the marginal value claimed for code, where compilers already own the static-analysis seat). SECOND, a deterministic world-POPULATION route: FK-L3-2(a) demonstrated end-to-end — extract (no LLM anywhere) -> stratum-4 records -> licensed answers, with the fail-closed boundary holding at the desugar step (semantic asks the grammar deliberately excludes — type-of, data-flow-of — refuse ERR_BAD_QUERY). The Codex audit's independent checks are load-bearing for this reading: exact sourceId->URN lookups everywhere (X3 trap honoured, no similarity path found), generator-engine import separation confirmed, 38 expectations re-derived from raw sources, and the frozen scope text confirmed to exclude every claim the record does not license.
a5.kill_chain_read: HA5 clause 1 (engine/store/extraction-mapping indictment) did NOT fire — the code vertical's engine leg SURVIVES. The NL-parse and LLM-comparison kills belong to a5-nl and a5-llm and are UNDECIDED here; in particular NO engine-vs-LLM differentiator claim passes or fails in this record — the arXiv:2505.12118 LLM-weakness motivation stays LIT-BACKED motivation, deliberately not re-measured. (a5-llm exists and is under a separate contested-audit ruling; this assessment neither borrows from nor prejudges it.) Net: supports 'the deterministic oracle pattern extends to a code vertical with engine unchanged'; leaves usefulness-to-models open.
caveats: Corpus representativeness UNMEASURED: 15 Python files, self-snapshot of this repo's own tooling — the friendliest possible codebase (written by the same programme, conservative exact-name call resolution suffices). Extrapolates to no other codebase or language (envelope verbatim); tree-sitter/multi-language scale-up is a registered successor.

ASM-0007 (STIPULATED, load-bearing): the construct->concept mapping and the six code-v0 concepts are STRUCTURAL definitions minted for this vertical, NOT NSM explications — this vertical exercises the kernel's machinery (content-addressed identity, strata, engine) more than its NSM semantics. The NSM-explicated-code-concepts successor is where that gap closes; until then a5's support reaches the formalism, not the semantic-prime thesis.

ASM-0009 (STIPULATED, not load-bearing): extraction is conservative static assertion; soundness w.r.t. Python RUNTIME semantics (dynamic dispatch, monkey-patching) is not claimed — the verdict scores against the records. Any successor scoring against ground-truth program behaviour needs its own extraction-adequacy evidence.

ASM-0008 single-author circularity: same mechanism and same resolution as l3a/ASM-0006 — the audit's independent re-derivation (38 samples + source spot-checks against the snapshot) is what the register demanded for the PASS to confirm, and it happened.
Control n=122 gives the refusal leg less statistical headroom (LB 0.9783 vs gate 0.95) than l3a's n=300; raw performance is 122/122. Both legs remain far from their gates.

interpretation.cross_cutting_theme: HOW FAR DOES THE MEASURED DETERMINISTIC-GROUNDING CASE REACH? Four threads. (1) THE ENGINE SEAT IS REAL, CHEAP, AND PORTABLE — AS AN INSTRUMENT. Law 3's winning topology needs a deterministic engine that owns correctness; the programme now has one that is MEASURED-sound on two verticals with a byte-identical binary, fail-closed off its slice with named codes, provenance-carrying, and ~10^1 us/query on shared CPU. That is the strongest, cleanest evidence in the whole registry — and it is evidence about the INSTRUMENT, obtained entirely inside the fortress: both evals were authored against the engines' own stores, so exactness there is a consistency-and-licensing property, never world-accuracy. (2) THE TWO BOUNDARY CROSSINGS THAT WOULD MAKE IT MATTER ARE EXACTLY THE UNMEASURED LEGS. For grounding to help an LLM, natural language must reach the closed grammar (l3a-parse / a5-nl: unrun) and a model must be measurably better off with the engine than with the kernel-as-text null and strong baselines (l3a-cost / a5-llm: unrun or under separate contested-audit ruling; f2's secondaries remain MEASURED-UNAUDITED with a known oracle-leakage caveat; f2b-replicate's separation instrument is the template for doing this honestly). Every prior programme lesson says the NL boundary and the null are where mechanisms die; nothing in this batch tests either. (3) COVERAGE IS THE PERIMETER AND IT IS NARROW AND UN-TRANSFERRED. m0b puts the reachable fraction at ~1/3 of content-word mass on the friendliest corpus at the molecules rung — above the niche gate, real, and also the hard ceiling on every covered-slice claim; ASM-0002 (other corpora) is open with one live warning against assuming transfer, and the compression-census's measured engagement (~0.6% at proposition level, same corpus/instance) shows how much thinner USABLE coverage can be than token-mass coverage. (4) NET EPISTEMIC POSITION OF THE CORRECTNESS THESIS: 'a sound, licensed, fail-closed deterministic checker over kernel-governed records exists, extends across domains, and costs microseconds' is now MEASURED and cross-vendor-confirmed at R0. 'That checker, or the kernel it serves, makes any model more correct on any task at matched budget' is UNMEASURED — zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null. The measured evidence reaches exactly to the fortress wall: everything inside is solid; everything outside is the open half of the thesis, and the successors that decide it are already pre-registered.

epistemic_promotions.claim: kernel-vocabulary coverage of the pinned TinyStories task-family corpus is 0.3542 @ molecules-v0 (0.2210 @ kernel-v0; 0.7841 wn31-aligned reachable band), clearing the 0.20 NICHE-SCOPE gate — banner not bound
epistemic_promotions.scope: corpus b6bcc9f6 (1,709,765 content-word tokens), kernel instance of 2026-07-08, rung-indexed; extrapolates to NO other corpus, rung, or kernel state (ASM-0001; ASM-0002 stays open)

epistemic_promotions.claim: the kot-axiom/1 v0 engine + four-strata store is exact, licensed, provenance-carrying on its covered slice and fail-closed with strict named refusals elsewhere (600/600 + 300/300; LBs 0.9955/0.9911; 6/6 planted violations)
epistemic_promotions.to: MEASURED (audit CONFIRMED — full MEASURED, not MEASURED-UNAUDITED)
epistemic_promotions.scope: THIS engine build (d2064989), THIS 6-record axiom set, THIS 598-record world layer, THIS 900-query gold-parse closed-grammar eval; R0

epistemic_promotions.claim: the engine extends to a code vertical UNCHANGED — data + pure desugaring only — with the same exactness/fail-closed profile (855/855 + 122/122; LBs 0.9968/0.9783; 3/3 planted violations), including cross-domain reuse of kernel-v0 part-of/has-part
epistemic_promotions.scope: byte-identical engine pin + kot_code.py desugar, 5 code axioms, 889-record world layer extracted from ONE pinned 15-file Python self-snapshot, 977-query eval; R0

epistemic_promotions.claim: a deterministic (no-LLM) extraction route can populate a stratum-4 world layer end-to-end (FK-L3-2(a))
epistemic_promotions.scope: kot-code-extract/1 on the pinned snapshot; conservative static assertion; NO runtime-semantics soundness (ASM-0009), NO representativeness claim
epistemic_promotions.backing: registry/verdicts/a5.json (instrument gate + strata counts) + audit generator-separation and source spot-checks

epistemic_promotions.claim: any NL-parse reachability, LLM-comparative accuracy or cost ratio, end-task benefit, real-world fact coverage, other-corpus coverage, or coverage-after-growth statement
epistemic_promotions.scope: successors l3a-parse, l3a-cost, a5-nl, a5-llm (separate contested-audit ruling), coverage-growth re-census; none may be premised on this batch

forks_resolved.resolution: RESOLVED — gate cleared (0.3542 > 0.20): the NICHE-SCOPE banner does not bind on verdict templates and the frontier-pitch coverage-growth cost line is not FORCED (coverage growth remains a live axis on the merits). Corpus/instance-scoped; re-evaluated as the kernel grows (coverage-growth curve RT-11).
RESOLVED — stage certified, kill did not fire. Clauses 2-3 (NL boundary, LLM differentiator) remain OPEN by construction under successor ids l3a-parse / l3a-cost.
RESOLVED — stage certified, kill did not fire. NL and LLM-comparison kills remain OPEN under a5-nl / a5-llm (a5-llm ruling is a separate task; nothing resolved here).

forks_resolved.fork: does the four-strata + closed-grammar design generalise beyond its first vertical without engine changes?
forks_resolved.resolution: MEASURED-YES within scope (one additional vertical, byte-identical engine, data+desugar only). Further verticals remain extrapolation.
forks_resolved.basis: a5 harness_manifest engine pin identity vs l3a + both verdicts

mechanism_state: alive — instrument legs banked (m0b gate cleared; l3a + a5 engine legs certified and cross-vendor confirmed); the usefulness legs (NL parse, LLM comparison, end-task) are the open critical path and are all pre-registered successors

questions_opened.question: The NL boundary is the highest-mortality unmeasured leg (HL3a clause 2 / a5-nl): mapper-parse vs gold-parse loss fraction on the SAME frozen evals. Everything this batch banked is reachable only through a closed grammar; if NL cannot reach it cheaply, the oracle stays an internal instrument. Tier-0-ish (mapper + existing evals), no GPU.

HL3a clause 3: LLM (R1-R3) + RAG arms on the frozen l3a slice at matched budget — the differentiator kill ('LLM+RAG matches engine accuracy at comparable cost') and the 10^3 cost-ratio claim. This is the record that converts the 5.3 us/query V-ledger line into (or kills) an efficiency-adjacent correctness argument. Tier 1 (Modal).
blocking: engine-vs-LLM claims on the family vertical

questions_opened.question: Standing gate: re-run the m0b census machinery on (a) the growing kernel (coverage-growth curve RT-11) and (b) EVERY new eval corpus before any design cites a coverage number for it (ASM-0002 resolution path; the D-EXT warning is live). Deterministic, ~$0 on-box.
blocking: any covered-slice power calculation on a non-TinyStories corpus

questions_opened.question: Retire the two vertical-scoped stipulations by minting: (a) person/has-parent etc. natively relational concepts, re-author axioms-v0/world-v0, state the full two-parents litmus axiom (ASM-0004 lapse; l3a design §7.3); (b) NSM-explicated code concepts per the idea-A sub-programme (ASM-0007 lapse; a5 design §7.3). Until then the oracle results support the formalism, not the NSM-semantics thesis.
blocking: reading l3a/a5 as evidence about NSM-explicated content

questions_opened.question: The envelopes make engine properties re-verifiable by regression: wire l3a + a5 evals into a standing regression that re-runs on ANY change to axiom inventory, world-layer size, extractor version, query grammar, or subClassOf/kot-ast-2 implementation — so the banked instrument facts stay banked as the formalism grows instead of silently expiring.
blocking: citing l3a/a5 after any grammar/inventory change

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements. a5-llm is deliberately NOT re-opened here — its ruling is a separate assigned task.

ledger_updates.statement: M0B-COVERAGE-GATE PASS: kernel-vocabulary coverage 0.3542 @ molecules-v0 (kernel-v0 0.2210; wn31-aligned reachable band 0.7841) over the full 1,709,765-token pinned census denominator; NICHE-SCOPE banner not bound. Coverage is corpus/rung/kernel-state-indexed and is the perimeter on every covered-slice claim: ~2/3 of the friendliest corpus's content-word mass is unreachable at the primary rung.
ledger_updates.scope: m0b, R0; TinyStories task-family table b6bcc9f6; incomplete kernel instance 2026-07-08; audit CONFIRMED

ledger_updates.statement: kot-axiom/1 v0 engine leg certified (HL3a clause 1 not fired): 600/600 covered-exact with provenance+license (Wilson LB 0.9955), 300/300 strict correct-refusal codes (LB 0.9911), 6/6 planted violations surfaced, 5.29 us/query; trivial policies bracket the conjunction. Instrument-adequacy fact; no NL, no LLM, no fact-coverage, no cost-ratio claim.
ledger_updates.scope: l3a, R0; engine d2064989, 6 axioms, 598 world records, 900-query gold-parse eval; audit CONFIRMED (34 expectations independently re-derived)

ledger_updates.statement: Code vertical engine leg certified (HA5 clause 1 not fired) with the engine BYTE-IDENTICAL to the l3a pin: 855/855 covered-exact (LB 0.9968), 122/122 strict refusals (LB 0.9783), 3/3 planted violations, 7.82 us/query; deterministic no-LLM extraction route FK-L3-2(a) demonstrated end-to-end; kernel-v0 part-of reused cross-domain. No engine-vs-LLM claim exists in this record (successor a5-llm, separate ruling).
ledger_updates.scope: a5, R0; 15-file pinned Python self-snapshot, 889 world records, 977-query eval; audit CONFIRMED (38 expectations re-derived; X3 exact-hash + generator separation verified)

ledger_updates.statement: This batch contains ZERO evidence of kernel usefulness to any model: both oracle evals are authored against their own stores (coverage by construction), all three records are R0 with scale_language_licensed none, and the NL-parse and LLM-comparison legs are pre-registered successors. The programme bottom line is unchanged: zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0001 (m0b coverage numbers, MEASURED, fully indexed)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: registry/verdicts/m0b.json + audit CONFIRM; restated here with all three indices (corpus, rung, kernel-state) per the register's correction entry; never quoted as 'natural coverage'.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0002 (coverage ~0.35 would hold on other corpora, EXTRAPOLATION)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: load_bearing:false; resolution_path = census every new corpus (stub coverage-growth-recensus). The f2 D-EXT non-transfer warning stands; no conclusion here premises this projection.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0003 (TinyStories mass as adequate Tier-0 gate proxy, STIPULATED)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: GNG-0-ratified, maintainer-owned; honoured — the gate reading above is stated as proxy-scoped; lapses for non-TinyStories corpora and frontier task families.
Lapses only when natively relational concepts are minted and corpora re-authored (stub native-relational-mint-successor); until then l3a numbers carry it as scope.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0005 (Presley anchor facts agent-recalled, STIPULATED, not load-bearing)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Against-records scoring keeps it non-load-bearing for the verdict; revisit condition (provenance-pinned re-sourcing) binds only successors scoring against reality.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0006 (l3a single-author eval circularity; audit-re-derivation revisit condition, STIPULATED)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: The register's condition — 'the l3a audit must specifically re-derive a sample of expected answers from data/world-v0 records independently; if it cannot, the PASS does not confirm' — WAS MET: Codex independently re-derived 34 expectations across all 17 families (registry/audits/l3a/1-gate-a-codex.json). The PASS lawfully confirms; the single-author authorship fact remains disclosed.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0007 (a5 construct->concept mapping; structural definitions NOT NSM explications, STIPULATED, load-bearing)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Honoured as a hard scope limit: a5 support reaches the formalism/machinery, not the NSM-semantics thesis; lapses at the NSM-explicated code-concept successor.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0008 (a5 single-author eval circularity; audit-re-derivation revisit condition, STIPULATED)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Condition met: Codex re-derived 38 expectations across all 19 families plus source spot-checks against the pinned snapshot (registry/audits/a5/1-gate-a-codex.json). The PASS lawfully confirms; authorship fact remains disclosed.

assumptions_resolved.id: ASM-0009 (a5 extraction conservative-static, no runtime-semantics soundness, STIPULATED, not load-bearing)
assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: Against-records scoring; binds any successor scoring against ground-truth program behaviour to register its own extraction-adequacy evidence.

boundary_stops.reason: Explicitly assigned as a SEPARATE Fable task; this assessment references a5-llm only as an existing successor and neither interprets its endpoints nor weighs its audit dispute.

boundary_stops.item: Freezing/designing the successor records (l3a-parse, l3a-cost, a5-nl; native-relational and NSM-code-concept mints; regression-suite wiring)
boundary_stops.reason: Design + prereg work outside the analyst role; interpretive input above: the NL leg is the highest-information next spend, and the engine-growth regression is what keeps this batch's banked facts citable as the formalism evolves.

tree_impact: ORACLE+COVERAGE family after this assessment: all three leaves CLOSED as instrument/perimeter facts — m0b gate cleared (banner not bound; number banked with all indices; standing re-census gate), l3a engine leg certified, a5 code-vertical leg certified with byte-identical-engine portability and a demonstrated deterministic population route. The correctness thesis's deterministic-grounding case is now measured up to the fortress wall: sound, fail-closed, licensed, microsecond-cheap checking over kernel-governed records EXISTS (MEASURED, cross-vendor CONFIRMED, R0) — and every step that would make it matter to a model (NL parse in, LLM comparison, end-task lift over the kernel-as-text null) is an open pre-registered successor, not a licensed claim. No number in this batch may be quoted without its envelope: m0b's 0.3542 is corpus/rung/kernel-state-indexed; l3a/a5 exactness is against self-authored stores at R0. Fable interpretive assessment is DONE for m0b, l3a, a5. Coordinator actions (out of my scope): append the three audit-status lines; schedule successors per questions_opened.
